<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get market index by name"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/indexes/{name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a single market index definition by its canonical name.
